finding: Item 6 table states '$564 to $860 per guest room per month' but Item 11 (p.54) clarifies the annualized cost is '$6,768 to $10,320 per year' per hotel. This is a per-hotel monthly fee that varies by hotel size, not a per-room charge.
resolution: Connected Room maintenance = $564–$860/month per hotel. Canonical updated.
